svg.text: MICROSERVICES · API GATEWAY · DOCKER COMPOSE · MVP v1.0

g.text: Stateless · P95 overhead ≤ 50ms · Connect 1s / Read 2s timeout · X-User-Id + X-User-Role injection
utf8mb4 · Docker Volume (mysql-data) · Healthcheck: mysqladmin ping · Init: 01~06 SQL scripts
Bridge network: awsomeshop-net · DNS-based service discovery
Microservices · API Gateway · JWT Stateless Auth · Saga Compensation · Pessimistic Lock · Database-per-Service · Docker Compose · SPA + Reverse Proxy
